name: Onion Casserole#2
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of chicken soup (10-3/4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onion and butter in a 3 quart casserole dish.
2. Cook 7-10 minutes until tender, stirring halfway through cooking time.
3. Blend in cream of chicken soup, paprika, and mushrooms; cook two more minutes.
4. Toss croutons with butter.
5. Spoon over onion mixture.
6. Sprinkle with cheeses and paprika as desired.
7. Cook one to two minutes or until cheese is melted.
